flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northeastern Junior College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (918 → 786).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeastern Junior College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northeastern Junior College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (65.7% → 72.6%).
